sections.paragraph:
κατασκοπέω 1 aor. κατεσκόπησα (=prec. entry; Eur., Hel. 1607; 2 Km 10:3; 1 Ch 19:3. Elsewh. usu. in mid.) spy out, lie in wait for τὴν ἐλευθερίαν ἡμῶν our freedom Gal 2:4.—DELG s.v. σκέπτομαι. M-M. TW.

aor. aor. = aorist

prec. prec. = preceding

Eur Eur , V b.c.—List 5

usu. usu. = usually

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

M-M M-M = JMoulton/GMilligan, Vocabulary of Greek Testament—Lists 4, 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 527
